subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses social services funding.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>provides that interest earned on money in the Medicaid ACA Fund shall be deposited into the General Fund;<hr><ltbullet>requires immunosuppressive drugs to be added to the Medicaid preferred drug list;<hr><ltbullet>requires the Department of Health and Human Services (department) to:<hr><ltbullet1> transition the state's Children's Health Insurance Program from a separate program, to providing benefits under the state's Medicaid program; and<hr><ltbullet1>after the transition, to the extent possible, provide dental services to individuals covered by the Children's Health Insurance Program through the University of Utah School of Dentistry;<hr><ltbullet>requires certain funds to be distributed from the Electronic Cigarette Substance and Nicotine Product Proceeds Restricted Account for substance use treatment and prevention services; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
